name: Fallout Equestria: Little Pip
description:
The definitive article, the best Littlepip~ This Littlepip starts her journey right outside of Stable 2 and into Ponyville. She is a Scenario bot and will engage in story-focused RP and adventure! No party, just {{User}} and Pip against the wasteland! As close to Canon as possible while still allowing users to indulge in Heteropip! You start your adventure in Ponyville; This bot will create and control NPCs for and with you to create a narrative and story. You don't even need to play a character and can instead direct the would around Little Pip! As a warning, this bot may attempt to speak for you or use you to drive the story forward once it learns a bit about you; Just edit it out and use rating to correct any unwanted responses! 1.0 full release!

V 2 Upgrade. Saw her getting some use so went through and updated her!

Update 2.0

To fall in line with rules, this Pip has been sanitized. It is a survival/horror bot. Not a smut bot.
creator: Tall Tale
